prestazioni: 4B11T MIVEC 2.0L turbocharged engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade to a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II with a 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe (Cobb Tuning) and a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust system with 304 stainless steel tips for optimized spool and reduced backpressure

Engine internals reinforcement: Manley forged pistons (87.5mm, 9.0:1 CR) with ARP L19 head studs and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings, combined with a Tomei Type-S billet crankshaft and Eagle H-beam connecting rods for 35psi boost capability

Chassis-specific suspension overhaul: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Lancer Ralliart-specific valving) with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs, Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm), and Cusco front strut tower bar (Type OS) for precise turn-in and reduced body roll
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Lancer Ralliart-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, overfenders, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and matte gunmetal accents on the roof and mirrors

Voltex Type-5 rear wing (1700mm width, 3D carbon fiber) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals with adjustable angle (0-15°), complemented by a Seibon carbon fiber hood (Type 2, 30% weight reduction) with integrated NACA ducts for intercooler cooling

OEM+ aggressive stance: Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +20 front, 18x10.5 +25 rear) with Nitto NT05R tires (255/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear), paired with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) and rolled fenders for zero clearance issues
